title: Simple RPG Stats
description: Kill Mobs to level up, use perk points to upgrade your stats
body:
A Data-Driven Perk Mod.

Kill mobs to earn XP, Level Up to earn points to spend on perks.

Configurable via the toml file, add any number of perks, specify mobs to give more XP, change almost anything.

This mod also adds 2 new items - Worn Notebook and Filagree Texts.
- Worn Notebook adds XP based on the xp_awarded component
- Filagree Texts adds points based on the points_awarded component

NOTE: This mod is not configured by default. This is mainly meant for Modpacks.

NOTE: The mod config exists on the server only. It does not need to be distributed to players
